rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by aligning assumed and actual types in equations and guarantees
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantee expressions
Remove guarantees with unresolved references or invalid types instead of adding architecture
Use int, real, and bool as AGREE scalar type names in const and eq declarations
Use bool for comparison expressions, int for integer literals and arithmetic, and real for real literals and arithmetic
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible identifiers in validator repairs
Remove invalid guarantees instead of adding architecture
Align assumed and actual types in validator repairs
Use AGREE scalar type names int, real, and bool in validator repairs
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use int for integer literals and arithmetic
Use real for real literals and arithmetic
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantee expressions
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture to repair unresolved references or invalid types
Do not use AGREE scalar type names integer, boolean, or float in validator repairs
Do not use non-visible identifiers in validator repairs
Do not align assumed and actual types by changing unrelated architecture
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
